config.name: kmd2_fable_v4_probe_init
config.hypothesis: CE provably never CREATES q->k alignment (trained gap -0.04) though the info is there (pooled probe 95%). Seed q_proj/k_slots[slot0] from offline InfoNCE probes (per-token eval 29% mean, 40-64% best layers vs 8% chance) so alignment EXISTS at init; test whether CE amplifies it into recall or the format attractor destroys it. No proxy/loss/freeze change.
